mapper.update:
update emp
name = #{name},
code = #{code},
email = #{email},
mobile = #{mobile},
id_card = #{idCard},
birthday = #{birthday},
sex = #{sex},
nation_code = #{nationCode},
political_code = #{politicalCode},
native_place = #{nativePlace},
graduate_school = #{graduateSchool},
major_code = #{majorCode},
highest_education_code = #{highestEducationCode},
highest_degree_code = #{highestDegreeCode},
habitation = #{habitation},
marital_status = #{maritalStatus},
entry_date = #{entryDate},
leave_date = #{leaveDate},
dept_id = #{deptId},
post_level_id = #{postLevelId},
user_id = #{userId},
role_type = #{roleType},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.name, e.code, e.email, e.mobile, e.id_card, e.birthday, e.sex, e.nation_code, e.political_code, e.native_place, e.graduate_school, e.major_code, e.highest_education_code, e.highest_degree_code, e.habitation, e.marital_status, e.entry_date, e.leave_date, e.dept_id, e.post_level_id, e.user_id, e.role_type, e.status, d.name AS deptName, epl.name AS postLevelName FROM emp e LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON e.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN emp_post_level epl ON e.post_level_id = epl.id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId}

select id, name, code, email, mobile, id_card, birthday, sex, nation_code, political_code, native_place, graduate_school, major_code, highest_education_code, highest_degree_code, habitation, marital_status, entry_date, leave_date, dept_id, post_level_id, user_id, role_type, status from emp where name = #{name} limit 1
SELECT d.name as deptName, COUNT(e.id) as employeeCount FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN emp e ON d.id = e.dept_id AND e.status = 0 GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY employeeCount DESC
